rule_mismatches_detected.clause: This market resolves YES only upon an Official SEC 8-K Filing confirming the release by May 31. Media reports do not qualify.
rule_mismatches_detected.conflict_reason: Reports do not satisfy the required 'Official SEC 8-K Filing'. Payout may resolve against a headline-based YES.

score_breakdown.detail: Resolution requires 'Official SEC 8-K Filing'; press/media reports do not satisfy it.

summary: ABORT_TRADE: resolution hinges on 'Official SEC 8-K Filing', not the headline.
